channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter in Mounthurst Road, 5th July
item.description:
There is litter in Mounthurst Road, specifically: 1. In the kerbs and carriageway between bus shelter 0106 1051 and entrance to Chilham Way on both sides of the road 2. On the grass verge outside 62-68 Mounthurst Road All this litter needs to be picked up and removed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mounthurst Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on grass verges in Farleigh Avenue, 5th July
item.description:
There is litter on the large grass verges in Farleigh Avenue on the 'odd' numbered side of the road (when turning right into the road from Boughton Avenue). This litter needs to be picked up and removed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farleigh Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree showing signs of distress, 5th July
item.description:
In the disputed storage area at the junction of Dacres Road and Perry Vale. One of the three trees which apparently have TPO on them. The right half of the tree appears to be in distress. See how the boughs are drooping on the right and the noticeable reduction of the leaf cover.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dacres Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree cuttings next to street tree outside 1 Boughton Avenue, 5th July
item.description:
There is a pile of cuttings from the street tree next to the tree on the grass verge outside 1 Boughton Avenue. These cuttings need to be removed - please would you arrange for them to be picked up and removed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boughton Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 5th July
item.description:
The above photographs show rubbish bedn flytipped down Hawksbrook lane noticed this 4/7/26

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawksbrook Lane, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree cuttings next to grass verge in Boughton Avenue, 5th July
item.description:
There is a pile of cuttings from the street tree next to the tree on the grass verge outside 9 Boughton Avenue. These cuttings need to be removed - please would you arrange for them to be picked up and removed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boughton Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: G, 5th July
item.description:
Dear team, this bin has been in pynham close,front of house number 20-22 since very long. I guess more than 6 months. It does not have house number and looks like the woner is gone away for many months. I reported previously but not collected yet. But report says fixed. it has food and other rotten item inside. It very hazardous to the people living in the area and spoiled the beauty of our area. Could I please bring your attention to confiscate / removal of the bin from this area please. Please see my previous reference in one of the photograph attatched Thanks Best regards

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pynham Close, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in Boughton Avenue, 5th July
item.description:
There is litter on the grass verge outside 23 to 27 Boughton Avenue. Please would you arrange for the litter to be picked up and removed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boughton Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gang tags, 5th July
item.description:
Massive gang tags on the metal shutters&wall of the former Tesco express
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Lane, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street tree in Boughton Avenue is dying of thirst, 5th July
item.description:
A young street tree on the grass verge in Boughton Avenue (nearest house is 20 Boughton Avenue) is dying of thirst and urgently needs to be watered. When I saw it today, I gave it the little water I had on me but it needs much more. Please would you arrange for this tree to receive the necessary frequent watering in the current dry spell.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boughton Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green waste from next to credenhill, 5th July
item.description:
Residents cleaned up this green area because the council wouldn't.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ledbury Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large thorny weed growing on grass verge in Boughton Avenue, 5th July
item.description:
A large thorny weed is growing on the grass verge very close to the street tree on the grass verge in Boughton Avenue (nearest house is 20 Boughton Avenue). This weed needs to be dug up and removed ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boughton Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandon car, 5th July
item.description:
BD62LYF Has been left outside my flat 29 old school close BR3 4PQ for the last 6 weeks. It has obviously broken down. It has made life very difficult for me to find a parking space near my flat. I am an OAP with a bad back so carrying shopping or just for practically. Do hope you can do something about this nuisance. Thank you in advance for your help on this matter
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old School Close, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on unnumbered green BT box in Farleigh Avenue, 5th July
item.description:
There is graffiti on the unnumbered green BT box in Farleigh Avenue near the junction with Eastry Avenue. This graffiti needs to be removed ASAP, otherwise it will multiply.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farleigh Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in road O/s 82 Moore Road, 5th July
item.description:
This pothole has been here for months and is gradually getting worse. Its in a line in the road. This is going to ruin vehicles and if a bike (motorbike or cyclist) hits this they will come off as its dangerous. You can hear when cars hit it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moore Road, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes blocking the entire street!, 5th July
item.description:
Lime bikes are blocking the entire street and pedestrian crossing at 124 Albany street NW1 4EL. This obstruction is particularly dangerous as it prevents people using wheelchairs or other mobility aids from crossing safely, posing a serious accessibility and safety concern.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-30, Robert Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped behind bin, 5th July
item.description:
Someone has just dumped stuff behind the clothing bin unfortunately, please come to clear? thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen branch from street tree in Farleigh Avenue, 5th July
item.description:
A large branch has fallen from the street tree in Farleigh Avenue at the junction with Chilham Way (first tree when turning right from Chilham Way). Please would you arrange for the branch to be picked up and removed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chilham Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green BT box in Chilham Avenue, 5th July
item.description:
There is graffiti on the unnumbered green BT box in Chilham Way at the junction with Farleigh Avenue. This graffiti needs to be removed ASAP, otherwise it will multiply.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chilham Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in Chilham Way, 5th July
item.description:
There is litter in Chilham Way, specifically: 1. Next to, around and behind the two wooden benches in the grassed area around the shops 2. On the ground next to the two litter bins 3. On the grass verges in front of Aces shop 4. On the grass verge outside 15 Chilham Way 5. On the grass verge outside 23 Chilham Way 6. On the carriageway outside 26 Chilham Way All this litter needs to be picked up and removed as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Chilham Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
